prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: Woke up. Product functions as advertised—basic human biological process initiated reliably each morning after approximately 6–8 hours of downtime. No notable features beyond standard consciousness restoration; lacks customization options (e.g., snooze-free, mood adjustment, or reduced existential dread). Performance inconsistent: occasional glitches include grogginess, disorientation, and unwelcome return to responsibilities. Battery life (i.e., lifespan) depletes steadily with use. Not compatible with weekends. Would not recommend if seeking luxury experience, though adequate for baseline survival needs.
